issue_title: StringEscapeUtils.escapeJavaScript() method did not escape '/' into '\/', it will make IE render page uncorrectly

method_signature.params_string: Writer out, String str, boolean escapeSingleQuote

org.apache.commons.lang.StringEscapeUtil.error_msg:

buggy_code_comment:
/** *

Worker method for the {@link #escapeJavaScript(String)} method.

* * @param out write to receieve the escaped string * @param str String to escape values in, may be null * @param escapeSingleQuote escapes single quotes if true * @throws IOException if an IOException occurs */
